titleStmt.title: SII 36.240: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 240. (A.R. No. 240 of 1910.) NARASIṄGAPURAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Narasimha Perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1456, Jayā, Mēsham, śu., 3, Friday, Mṛigasīrisha = A.D. 1534, April 17, Friday.)

Gift of 300 kuḻis of land and two houses in the temple street to two vaishṇava-brāhmaṇas for reciting the purāṇam, known as Bhakti Sañjīvini, in the temple of Lakshmī Narasimhamūrthy in Kūvam, surnamed Narasānāyakapuram in Chandragiri-rājyam, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, for the merit of Periyasvāmi Narasā Nāyakar. Each one of the brāhmaṇas was given a monthly remuneration of 3 paṇams and 3 kalams of paddy. In addition to this they shall receive a daily allowance of some specified quantity of sacred food (prasādam), betel leaves and a monthly quota of sandal. Achyutadēvarāya proclaimed the grant in the presence of Viṭṭalēśvara on the banks of the river Tuṅgabhadra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājāthirāja rājaparameśvara śrī vīrapratāpa Accutaiyadeva mahārāyar prathivirājyam paṇṇiaṟuḷāniṉṟa cakābdam 1000 4 100 5 10 6ku
meṟcellā niṉṟa jaya samvatsarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu tritiyaiyum guru vāramum mrugaśiriṣa nakṣatramum peṟṟa Iṟṟai nāḷ jeyaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu ca
ndragiri rājyattu kūvattukku pratināmamāna narasānāyakkapurattu lakṣminarasimhamūrtati sannithiyil purāṇam bhaktisantcīvini sevikka viśvāmitra gotrattu Āpastambha sūtrattu
yajīśśākhyāyiyāna varadasamudram tirumalaiyaṅkāriṭa putrar veṅkaḷaiyaṅkārukkum viśvāmitra gotrattu Āpastambha sūtrattu yajīśśākhyāyiyāna varadasamudram śrīraṅgayyaṅgāriṭa putrar tiruma
laiyaṅgārukkum tuṅgabhadrātīrattile vimṭhaleśvarar sannithiyile dārāpūrvva māka jeya samvatusarattu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvva pakṣattu tritiyaiyum guru vāramum mragaśiriṣa nakṣa
tramum peṟṟa Inṟaiṉāḷ Akṣotritiya puṇyakālattile svāmi Accutadeva mahārāyar periyasvāmi narasānāyakkaṟku puṇyamāka narasānāyakapuratti lakṣminarasiṅ
hamūtti sannathiyile purāṇam bhaktisantcīvini sevikkiṟattukku kaṭṭaḷai periraṇṭukku peṟ per Oruttaṟku māsamoṉṟukku mūṉṟu paṇamum mukkala nellu dinamoṉṟukku ṉānāḻi
prasādamum vakaikkoru tiruppaṇyāra prasādamum Aṭaikkāyamutu Añcu pākkum pattu veṟṟilaiyu māsamoṉṟukku ṉālu palac cāttuppaṭi caṉtaṇamum prahalāda varadariṭa pra
tiṣṭhāveḷaiyile prahalādavaradar śrīhastattiṉāl dārai vārttuk kuṭutta nilam kūvattu Ēri kīḻe kuḻi muṉṉūṟukku viparam tirupuvaṉamādevi viḷākattil maṉṟāṭu toṭṭam kiḻakku 1 ku Iraṇṭumā 1muntiri
piḷiyañceṟu kiḻakku 1 2 10 4mā 1kāṇi Iraṇṭumā kiśakku 1 �mūn_ṛumā Arai cekkiḻāṉattam 9 (1/4) kuśi 6 10 3 mukkāl Irācacavun=tari viḷākattil kaṇavaṟṟuttalil kuḻi 2 10 5 koṇpulam 1 kku 2 10 1 (1/4) mukkāṇi coḻakulavalli viḷākattil
kovaṉ kuṇṭil 1 kku 10 8 kāmakkoṭṭiyil kuḻi 4 tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam kuḻi 4 10 2 nālumā 1kāṇi cuttavalli viḷākattil kūṉaṟkkuṟai kuṇṭil Uḷpaṭa 1k kuḻi 2 10 3 bhocāpiḷḷaiyar ku
ṇṭil kiḻakku 1ku 2 10 5 Iraṇṭumā Āka 3 100 6(1/4)mūn_ṛumā mukkāṇiyum sannati teruvil teṉciṟakil mutal maṉai raṇṭum Ācantrārkasdāyā putrapautra pāramparyamāka Aṉupavittuk koḷḷa
Digital edition of SII 36.240 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
